history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot of a dark-themed mobile messaging or browsing page showing search-related controls and multiple lines of Indonesian text about camera pricing and where to buy.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the large block of Indonesian text on the screen, along with a Google icon and various interface elements typical of a mobile app.

Setting:
This is an indoor, screen-capture style image showing a smartphone interface with a dark background and multiple UI icons. Lighting and weather are not applicable because it is a digital screenshot.

Visual Details:
The background is dark gray to black with lighter gray text and some colored icons. At the top center there is a multicolored “G” icon. Near the top left there is a hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines). Near the top right there is an “X” close icon. On the right side near the middle there is a small circular icon with a “G” and a “+5” indicator. A speaker icon appears in a small circle on the left side of the middle area. At the bottom there is a long rounded input bar with the placeholder text “Tanyakan apa saja,” and to the right of it are a microphone icon and a camera-like icon. Along the very bottom edge are navigation labels and icons: “Beranda,” “Telusuri” with a magnifying glass icon, “Notifikasi” with a bell icon and a “9+” badge, and “Aktivitas” with a circular/clock-like icon. A few lines include blue underlined link-style words.

Visible Text:
00.15
Woi mбот, berapa harga hasselblad x2d
Harga Hasselblad X2D 100C untuk unit baru (kondisi Brand New in Box) berkisar antara Rp135.000.000 hingga Rp147.500.000 tergantung toko dan promo. Sementara itu, untuk unit second atau bekas, harganya berada di kisaran Rp76.000.000 hingga Rp85.000.000.
DOSS Camera & Ga... +4
Untuk ketersediaan dan detail pembelian yang aman, kamu bisa cek langsung ke beberapa toko kamera terpercaya berikut:
Cek garansi dan cicilan resmi di DOSS.
Lihat penawaran harga di platform seperti Blibli.
Cek opsi cicilan atau toko yang menyediakan unit ready stock melalui Shopee.
Tanyakan apa saja
Beranda
Telusuri
Notifikasi
9+
Aktivitas

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark mobile app or chat-like interface with a large Indonesian text section discussing pricing ranges for a Hasselblad model. It also lists options for checking warranty, promotions, and installment offers, with some words appearing as blue, link-style text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

woi mbot, berapa harga hasselblad x2d

Harga Hasselblad X2D 100C untuk unit baru (kondisi Brand New in Box) berkisar antara Rp135.000.000 hingga Rp147.500.000 tergantung toko dan promo. Sementara itu, untuk unit second atau bekas, harganya berada di kisaran Rp76.000.000 hingga Rp85.000.000.

DOSS Camera & Ga... +4

Untuk ketersediaan dan detail pembelian yang aman, kamu bisa cek langsung ke beberapa toko kamera terpercaya berikut:

- Cek garansi dan cicilan resmi di DOSS.

# Structured Version

## Chat / Message
- **Prompt:** woi mbot, berapa harga hasselblad x2d

## Info Harga Hasselblad X2D 100C
- **Unit baru** (Brand New in Box): Rp135.000.000 – Rp147.500.000 (tergantung toko dan promo)
- **Unit second / bekas:** Rp76.000.000 – Rp85.000.000

## Sumber/Referensi Toko Terpercaya
Untuk ketersediaan dan detail pembelian yang aman, kamu bisa cek langsung ke beberapa toko kamera terpercaya berikut:
- Cek garansi dan cicilan resmi di **DOSS**.
- Lihat penawaran harga di platform seperti **BliBli**.
- Cek opsi cicilan atau toko yang menyediakan unit ready stock melalui **Shopee**.

## UI Teks (Footer)
- Tanyakan apa saja
- Beranda
- Telusuri
- Notifikasi
- Aktivitas

## Lainnya
- **DOSS Camera & Ga...** +4

# Notes
- Teks **“BliBli”** kemungkinan adalah **“Blibli”** tetapi mengikuti ejaan yang terlihat pada screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
